## 📸 Pull Request

> 🌟 **第一次提交？** 欢迎！请先阅读 [新手指南 / Beginner Guide](GUIDE.md) 了解完整的提交流程。
> 你也可以参考其他贡献者的目录结构（如 [A](../A)、[B](../B)...），或浏览 [已合并的 PR](../../pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged) 来了解正确的提交方式。
>
> 🌟 **First time?** Welcome! Please read the [Beginner Guide](GUIDE.md) for the full submission workflow.
> You can also check other contributors' folders (e.g. [A](../A), [B](../B)...) or browse [merged PRs](../../pulls?q=is%3Apr+is%3Amerged) for reference.

### 描述 / Description
<!-- 请简要描述你的PR内容 / Please briefly describe your PR -->

### 检查清单 / Checklist

- [ ] 图片已压缩至 1MB 以内 / Images are compressed to under 1MB
- [ ] 已移除图片中的 EXIF 信息（参考 [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)）/ EXIF data has been removed from images (see [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md))
- [ ] 文件夹以 GitHub ID 命名，并放在对应首字母目录下 / Folder is named after my GitHub ID and placed under the correct alphabetical directory
- [ ] 图片为本人原创，未盗用他人作品 / Images are original and not stolen from others
